headline: Deal Dispatch: Blackstone Buys Dresser Utility, EcoLab Takes Over CoolIT For $4.75B, Whitewater Amphitheater Bankruptcy
summary: Major M&A deals this week include: Sentinel Capital acquires DecoPac Inc, Solina buys Epicurean Butter, Southwest Concrete bankruptcy
